summary: Iteration 78 - Testing Professional Leads Management Module. All backend APIs and frontend features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Professional Leads Management module fully tested. All features working: 1) GET /api/crm/leads/advanced - Returns leads with pagination and stats, supports search, source/stage/priority filters, quick filters (fresh, today, follow_up_due, unassigned, hot_leads, converted, lost), and sorting options. 2) GET /api/crm/leads/stats - Returns correct counts for total, fresh, today, follow_up_due, hot, converted, lost, unassigned. 3) POST /api/crm/leads/bulk-assign - Validates input (returns 400 for empty lead_ids or missing staff_id). 4) POST /api/crm/leads/bulk-update - Validates input (returns 200 with success=false for empty inputs). 5) POST /api/crm/leads/check-duplicate - Works for phone and email duplicate detection. 6) Frontend at /admin/leads renders correctly with stats cards, table view, card view, search, filters, bulk selection, and Add Lead modal.

backend: GET /api/crm/leads/advanced - returns correct structure with leads, pagination, stats
GET /api/crm/leads/stats - returns all 8 stat fields (total, fresh, today, follow_up_due, hot, converted, lost, unassigned)
frontend: Stats cards display: Total (76), Fresh (4), Today (0), Follow-up Due (68), Hot (0), Unassigned (60), Converted (0), Lost (0)
Table view shows leads with columns: Lead, Contact, Location, Source, Stage, Priority, Assigned, Follow-up, Created, Actions
Search functionality works - filters leads by name/phone/email/district
Source filter dropdown works - filters by Website, WhatsApp, etc.
Stage filter dropdown works - filters by New Lead, Contacted, etc.
Priority filter dropdown works - filters by Hot, Warm, Cold, Low Quality
Quick filter buttons (stats cards) work - clicking Fresh shows 4 leads, clicking Unassigned shows 60 leads
Bulk selection works - checkbox selects lead, bulk actions bar appears with Assign, Change Stage, Priority, Export, Delete buttons
View toggle works - switches between Table View and Card View
Add Lead modal opens with all required fields: Name, Phone, Alternate Phone, Email, District, Property Type, Monthly Bill, Required Capacity, Lead Source, Priority, Address, Notes
Card view displays leads with colored badges for source, stage, priority

features_verified.advanced_leads_endpoint: WORKING - GET /api/crm/leads/advanced returns leads with pagination and stats
features_verified.duplicate_check_endpoint: WORKING - POST /api/crm/leads/check-duplicate detects duplicates by phone/email
features_verified.stats_cards: WORKING - 8 stats cards with correct counts and quick filter functionality
features_verified.table_view: WORKING - Shows all required columns with inline stage/priority dropdowns
features_verified.card_view: WORKING - Shows leads in card format with colored badges
features_verified.search_functionality: WORKING - Filters by name, phone, email, district, lead ID
features_verified.filter_dropdowns: WORKING - Source, Stage, Priority filters work correctly
features_verified.bulk_selection: WORKING - Checkbox selection with bulk actions bar
features_verified.add_lead_modal: WORKING - All form fields present with validation
